summary: Start M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 after M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 closed in origin/main. The writer must create low-fidelity COMPOSITE strategic terrain fixture content using accepted terrain-route-node schema boundaries while keeping historical claims explicitly tagged and reviewed.

tests_run.result: main was clean before creating fixture branch.
M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 was the only READY task.

decisions.decision: Start fixture/content work only after the accepted strategic terrain schema entered main and was closed.
Fixture work may use low-fidelity COMPOSITE data but must not overclaim exact historical geography, formal GIS data, final art, production cultural assets, or content lock acceptance.
The task requires historical_researcher, systems_architect, and independent qa_reviewer acceptance before integration.

risks.summary: Terrain, pass, river, road, polity, culture, or language claims could be mistaken for exact historical fact.
risks.mitigation: Use HISTORICAL/INFERRED/COMPOSITE/FICTIONAL tagging and route to historical_researcher before acceptance.

risks.summary: Fixture content could accidentally reintroduce hidden grid/lattice/sequential-id shortcuts.
risks.mitigation: Add compiler/runtime negative tests for hidden grid/lattice leakage, governance-as-route shortcuts, missing endpoints, duplicate ids, and barrier crossings without explicit nodes/corridors.

requested_action: Implement only the allowed fixture/content and validation scope, then return REVIEW handoff routed first to historical_researcher.
